## What changed

Describe the user-visible behavior and the smallest reason for the change.

## Boundary affected

Note any parser, provider, retrieval, persistence, privacy, or UI boundary involved.

## Validation

- [ ] Added or updated a deterministic test.
- [ ] Ran the focused tests for the changed surface.
- [ ] Ran `make check`, or listed the exact checks not run and why.
- [ ] Used only synthetic or redistribution-safe document fixtures.
- [ ] Kept credentials, private documents, provider payloads, and runtime data out of the diff.

## Proof not performed

List live-provider, container, browser, hosted, or production proof that was not run. Use `None`
only when each relevant layer was actually checked.
